title: Crystal Ball of Mind Reading

markdown:
# Crystal Ball of Mind Reading

While touching this crystal orb, you can cast [[scrying]] (save DC 17) with it. In addition, you can cast [[detect_thoughts Thoughts]] (save DC 17) targeting creatures you can see within 30 feet of the spell's sensor. You don't need to concentrate on this [[detect_thoughts Thoughts]] spell to maintain it during its duration, but it ends if the [[scrying]] spell ends.
